sections.paragraph:
masculine noun

glow, splendor, brilliance, radiance, glare, glisten, glitter, incandescence, fire, flame, glamor, glamour, lambency, light, effulgence, lucidity

adjective

glowing, radiating, shining, glistening, glittering, incandescent, lambent, lucid, effulgent, fiery, flaming, flaring

noun
